input.title: Prolonged priapism following self-administration of melanotan II: a case report
input.abstract: A 34-year-old male presented to the emergency department with a painful erection lasting 7 hours following self-administration of 1 mg subcutaneous melanotan II purchased online. He had no prior history of priapism or haematological disorders. Corporal aspiration confirmed ischaemic priapism; detumescence was achieved after intracavernosal phenylephrine. Serum testosterone and prolactin were normal. The patient reported using melanotan II for tanning purposes based on online forums. This case highlights a serious adverse effect of unregulated self-administration of melanotan II and underscores the dangers of unmonitored use of this research peptide.
